steps.title: Find the shared property
steps.content: The notes show the same pattern in both countries: Manila is the capital of the Philippines but Quezon City is its largest city, and Vaduz is the capital of Liechtenstein but Schaan is its largest city.

steps.title: Reject one-sided details
steps.content: B names the most populous cities but does not connect them to the capitals. C covers only the Philippines. D names the capitals but omits the population contrast. The best statement directly says the capital is not the most populous city in both countries. The answer is A.
